iot1click.device.CfnAbout: The `AWS::IoT1Click::Device` resource controls the enabled state of an AWS IoT 1-Click compatible device. For more information, see [Device](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-1-click/1.0/devices-apireference/devices-deviceid.html) in the *AWS IoT 1-Click Devices API Reference*.

iot1click.device.DeviceId.Description: The ID of the device, such as `G030PX0312744DWM`.

iot1click.device.Enabled.Description: A Boolean value indicating whether the device is enabled (`true`) or not (`false`).
